title: New Dawn: Vanilla Enhanced
description: Your favourite game with new blocks, quality-of-life improvements and performance boosts, while keeping the classic feel for a polished, enriched experience!
body:
# Introducing New Dawn: Vanilla Enhanced!

Dive into a new world of Minecraft with New Dawn, where the familiar meets the exceptional. This modpack enhances your vanilla gameplay with carefully selected blocks, items, and quality-of-life improvements, all while optimizing performance for a smoother experience.

**What’s Inside:**

- Enhanced Vanilla Blocks: Expand your building options with new and improved blocks that seamlessly integrate into the classic Minecraft world.
- Smart Additions: Discover new items and features designed to enrich your gameplay without overwhelming it.
- Performance Boosts: Enjoy a lag-free adventure with optimized performance enhancements.
- Quality of Life: Streamline your Minecraft experience with practical tweaks and improvements.

Download New Dawn now and transform your Minecraft world with the perfect blend of classic and cutting-edge!

## Requirements
Minimum 3GB of RAM are recommended. If possible, allocate at least 6GB to make sure everything runs smoothly

## Help and Support
You can reach us in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/hyGpwCp3zq) for any inquires regarding the modpack!
